Outdoor Amenities: Guests can relax in the garden or terrace, enjoy free WiFi, and utilise the outdoor seating and picnic areas. Additional facilities include bicycle parking, barbecue facilities, and free on-site private parking.
Local Attractions: Wakkerstroom Wetland is a 15-minute walk away, while Majuba Hill Battle Site lies 41 km from the property. Fishing, hiking, and cycling are popular activities in the surrounding area.
Guest Services: Private check-in and check-out, a 24-hour front desk, and express services enhance the guest experience.

hotels.name: MHONDORO SAFARI LODGE & VILLA
hotels.description_fr:

Le lodge comprend une cachette unique souterraine, prÃ¨s du point d'eau, afin d'observer la faune, les yeux dans les yeux.
Les suites climatisÃ©es sont pourvues d'une salle de bains et d'une terrasse d'observation privatives, cette derniÃ¨re Ã©tant situÃ©e au-dessus du point d'eau. La villa spacieuse est munie d'une piscine spa, d'une salle de sport et d'une autre de yoga.

hotels.description_en:
Situated inside the malaria-free Welgevonden Game Reserve, Mhondoro Lodge combines a modern mix of African chic and contemporary design. The lodge boasts a unique underground waterhole hide for eye-to-eye game viewing.
The air conditioned suites come equipped with an en-suite bathroom and a private viewing deck that overlooks the waterhole. The spacious villa has a spa pool, gym and yoga room.
Game drives are accompanied by professional rangers and are scheduled for the morning or evening. Special drives for children can be arranged. The lodge has an underground waterhole hide which is connected to the main lodge through a 50-meter reinforced concrete tunnel.

hotels.description_it:
Goditi un servizio di prima classe presso MHONDORO SAFARI LODGE & VILLA

Rifugio situato all'interno della riserva di caccia Welgevonden, senza malaria, il Mhondoro Lodge unisce un mix moderno di eleganza africana e un design contemporaneo, e offre un esclusivo nascondiglio sotterraneo, in una pozza d'acqua, per osservare faccia a faccia la fauna.

Le suite dispongono di aria condizionata, di un bagno interno e di una terrazza di osservazione privata con vista sulla pozza d'acqua. La spaziosa villa presenta una piscina con idromassaggio, palestra e sala yoga.

I safari vengono effettuati con ranger professionisti e vengono programmati per la mattina o la sera. Il personale organizza anche safari speciali per bambini.
